note: Box 4-5 (generate -> re-rank). Each candidate is a captured skill output produced under ONE lever: tuning the skill's output sub-sections. restructure-output-contract was DROPPED and is NOT a lever here.
checker_note: The full-bar (fidelity) judge model. The deterministic proxy in rerank.py is CODE (no model). Recorded per candidate for the model-separation gate: generator != checker, and neither may be claude-fable-5.

candidates.variant: baseline sub-sections (Diagnosis / Red Flags / Tactical-vs-Strategic / Design-it-Twice / PM Actions), no severity tags
collapsed Red Flags sub-section: reports only the single most-severe flag (information leakage), drops the rest
sub-section lever: adds a one-line Severity (HIGH/MED/LOW) tag under each red flag for PM triage; same recall coverage as C1
